briefs.title: Council to Consider $700,000 Increase to Archaeological Consulting Contract
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on a proposed contract change that would add $700,000 to an existing archaeological consulting services agreement, bringing the total estimated contract value to roughly $2.04 million over three years.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this could affect archaeological consulting work tied to Burnaby development projects.
